accurate.why: All provisions, deadlines, agencies, and the no-additional-funds clause accurately described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose across education, research, and school preparedness.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill amends the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes grant eligibility limited to local educational agencies consulting qualified health care entities, and no additional appropriations.

major_provisions_covered.why: All four major provisions thoroughly and accurately covered.

concise.why: Extremely detailed for a summary; essentially restates the bill in prose form, including granular specifics like individual syndrome names and evidence lifecycle details.

correct_entities.why: HHS Secretary, CDC, NIH, local educational agencies, and qualified health care entities correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
